creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: brnrd
Date: Wed Feb  8 20:16:31 UTC 2017
New revision: 433671
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/433671

Log:
  security/openssl: Enable ASM by default

    - Enable ASM option
      * By extension this enables AES-NI [1]
    - Order OPTIONS_DEFAULT alphabetically
    - Switch to using @sample [2]
    - Bump PORTREVISION

  PR:		216559 [2]
  Reported by:	dtestke [1]
  Submitted by:	Franco Fichtner <franco@opnsense.org> [2]

  Approved by:	asomers, allanjude

Changes:
  head/security/openssl/Makefile
  head/security/openssl/files/pkg-message.in
  head/security/openssl/pkg-plist
